response.justification: Candidate has a broad full-stack background spanning TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and various web/mobile technologies, but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. Only brief C++ exposure at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis project, far below the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ required. No SQL Server/Oracle experience, no Windows platform focus, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain knowledge.
strengths: Strong overall software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Diverse polyglot background across multiple platforms and domains
Brief prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a professional IDE product
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience — only ~6 months professionally, far below 5-10 year requirement
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development experience

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
